subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1913-08-10 in Ramleh
subcodes.first_line: If these Tablets do not stir and move the hearts out of their sleep and do not spur them to insatiable activity, they are harder than stones
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @the soul as soil; cultivation of the soul, @suffering and imprisonment
